c4_candidate_capability.description: A possible future scoped DevCockpitCore-local runner for a very small hardcoded command class, subject to separate design review, probe authorization, probe review, and hardening.
c4_candidate_capability.config_policy: Config may identify only an approved source-hardcoded key; it must not supply command strings, executables, argv, args, shell flags, cwd overrides, credentials, network endpoints, retries, or write targets.
c4_candidate_capability.cwd_policy: Any future C4 probe must run from the DevCockpitCore repository unless a later design review explicitly narrows a different repo-local cwd.
c4_candidate_capability.timeout_policy: Timeout must be required, bounded, and recorded in evidence.
c4_candidate_capability.output_policy: stdout and stderr must be captured as bounded excerpts with truncation flags.
c4_candidate_capability.redaction_policy: Local user paths and sensitive-looking values must be redacted before artifact write.
c4_candidate_capability.before_after_state_policy: Before and after repository state must include worktree, HEAD, branch, and remote parity.
c4_candidate_capability.validation_policy: Adapter validation remains ordinary validation evidence outside controlled_runner_probe unless a later accepted design and probe explicitly define a fixed safe path.
c4_candidate_capability.push_policy: Controlled runner behavior must not push, force push, merge, rebase, reset, stash, or otherwise mutate git history.

exact_two_c3_command_keys.summary: status_snapshot_help and adapters_validate_help are the only production C3 keys

no_third_c3_command.summary: no third C3 command is introduced or proposed

no_c4_implementation.summary: this design adds no C4 implementation

no_generalized_runner.summary: no generalized runner or config command registry is introduced
